title: Vaccine counseling documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

investigations.text: Requires screening before each dose and identifies severe previous reaction, acute illness severity, and immunosuppression-related precautions.
investigations.rationale: Supports clinician assessment of entered contraindications and precautions for paediatric vaccine counselling; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Requires screening before each dose and identifies severe previous reaction, acute illness severity, and immunosuppression-related precautions.

source.title: Guidelines for Best Practice in Immunization

assessment.text: Defines DHA immunization scope and the national childhood programme and schedule context.
assessment.rationale: Supports Dubai childhood-program and applicability context for paediatric vaccine counselling; no decision is generated.
assessment.evidence_extract: Defines DHA immunization scope and the national childhood programme and schedule context.

source.title: Guidelines for Best Practice in Immunization

exact_section.heading: 2. Scope; 3. Purpose; 4. Applicability; 5. Childhood Immunization Program 0 to 6 Years

follow_up.text: Requires review of the child vaccination history, use of age-appropriate catch-up scheduling, and completion without restarting a series solely because of elapsed time.
follow_up.rationale: Supports age-qualified immunisation-history review for paediatric vaccine counselling; no decision is generated.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Requires review of the child vaccination history, use of age-appropriate catch-up scheduling, and completion without restarting a series solely because of elapsed time.

source.title: Guidelines for Best Practice in Immunization

exact_section.heading: 5.8 Catch-Up Immunization for Children Aged 4 Months Through 6 Years

safety_netting.text: Requires benefits and risks discussion and after-care information on common effects, when to seek attention, and when to notify the facility.
safety_netting.rationale: Supports clinician-delivered education and aftercare documentation for paediatric vaccine counselling; no decision is generated.
safety_netting.evidence_extract: Requires benefits and risks discussion and after-care information on common effects, when to seek attention, and when to notify the facility.

source.title: Guidelines for Best Practice in Immunization

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Age, vaccine history, due status, contraindications, consent, product, dose, route, site, administration, counselling and follow-up remain absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for paediatric vaccine counselling.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
